ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-04-2010 Continued To Jun-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney for failure to respond to the Examiner's notes as to the intent to proceed on the waiver of account and filing of any amendment and notice. The return date is June 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
